summary: Verification contract re-executed independently of the implementing Sonnet subagents: meeting-api 495 passed / 18 skipped (consent NOT NULL invariant via real SQLite FK, Fernet disabled mode, match-then-discard with no persistence or vector logging, suggestions redacted from MeetingResponse.data / transcript data / ALL webhooks via single redaction source, PG+Redis suggested overlay, replace clears stale suggestions, transcript never delayed or failed by matching, lane-offset slicing, affected_clusters echo, 24mo retention sweep with post-success day-guard, entry-level suggestion merge with fail-before/pass-after race regressions); voiceprint-service 20 passed (model mocked, streaming size cap, compare_digest, no-vector-in-logs assert); dashboard 121 passed + tsc clean (suggestion chips, consent-worded enroll offer suppressed on acceptance, reject reconciliation); adapter validation 5/5; compose config resolves. Three-stage tribunal confirmed 12/12 findings (2 critical: webhook redaction divergence, post-commit lost-update race) — all fixed, HD-recorded. Fable final audit SHOULD_FIX: residual entry-level merge race fixed and classified; F2 retention approximation deferred (privacy-safe direction); F3 already handled. PII policy 8 items + proxy-consent operational acceptance approved and hash-recorded. Remaining risk is operational: 0.78 threshold requires FMR/FRR measurement from real-meeting logs before any auto-apply consideration (out of scope); feature is opt-in (compose profile + encryption key required).
